name: influencer-outreach
description: Write a personalized, non-spammy influencer collaboration DM or email that leads with value and clearly states the partnership opportunity.
input_description: Your brand name and product, influencer name and niche, collaboration type (gifting, paid post, affiliate, ambassador), compensation offered, and one genuine observation about their content.
output_description: A short outreach message (DM version under 150 words, email version under 250 words) with a personalized opener, clear value proposition, specific collaboration ask, and a low-friction next step.
